positive: Minimalist, stylized illustration of a cosmic sloth relaxing on a crescent moon, surrounded by vibrant, glowing nebula clouds and tiny, crystalline stars. The sloth should have a relaxed, almost sleepy silhouette, rendered in deep indigo and teal hues, contrasted with bright pops of cosmic magenta and gold dust. The background should be a deep, velvety black, providing high contrast. Flat vector art mixed with ethereal watercolor textures. Highly symmetrical, centered composition, perfect for screen printing on apparel, with clear, defined edges and graphic elements. Studio lighting setup, volumetric glow, high contrast, 8k quality, Zentangle patterns inspired details.
negative: blur, low resolution, artifacts, text, signature, watermark, extra limbs, bad anatomy, noise, messy, photorealistic, dirty, cluttered, gradient fade, logos, copyrighted, trademark
